value.found_quote: For the Codex app, CLI, or IDE Extension, the default `workspace-write` sandbox mode keeps network access turned off unless you enable it in your configuration
value.rationale: The page describes network access being off by default in workspace-write mode, enabling full internet access or a domain allowlist (via the network policy and "agent internet access" link), and web search/browser controls (web_search cached/live/disabled and --search). All elements of the claim are substantiated as current functionality.
